contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 75
- Description: Unified Agroverse event registry (machine-readable, past + upcoming)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/145
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/146
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/208
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/212
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/117
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_prod/pull/1
  
  Details:
  Built a machine-readable event registry for LLM ingestion across 3 repos. go_to_market: per-event event.json for the 3 upcoming activations + a generated index.json + build_index.py (mirrors the lineage-assets manifest+index pattern). Extended it to a unified two-tier index (schema v2): 'upcoming' (operational) + 'past' (29 published cacao-circle pages). agroverse_shop: build_events_json.py scans event-details-registration/ and emits events.json (title/date/location/url/image), flagging duplicate-placeholder dates via date_confidence + date_review_needed (20 of 29). Promoted to agroverse.shop (prod) preserving CNAME. agentic_ai_context: new EVENTS.md playbook (schema, phase convention, QR naming, Apple Reminder/Calendar check-in convention) + PROJECT_INDEX pointer. Live: https://agroverse.shop/event-details-registration/events.json
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 125.00
